title: hystrix gracilis
intro: Hystrix gracilis, also known as the porcupine grass, is a type of plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hystrix gracilis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations.
